TextENGNew: I'll tell you the conditions for unlocking G3 June 1983 in the World of 1983.
changeReason: Singular 'condition' changed to plural 'conditions' — the JP 出現条件 implies multiple prerequisites (as shown in the next entry listing two requirements).

TextENGNew:
H1 Keiichi Maebara in the World of Friends
G4 An Invitation Toward the End in the World of 1983
...After viewing the above fragments, this one will become available.
changeReason: Fragment title differs: 'An Invitation to an End' vs 'An Invitation Toward the End' — 終末への誘い uses へ (toward), making the new translation's directional nuance more accurate. Also 'pieces' changed to 'fragments' (カケラ).

TextENGNew:
And—
J1 A Fragment of Himatsubushi in the World of Beginnings
J2 A Fragment of Onikakushi in the World of Beginnings
J3 A Fragment of Watanagashi in the World of Beginnings
J4 A Fragment of Tatarigoroshi in the World of Beginnings
J5 A Fragment of Someutsushi in the World of Beginnings
J6 A Fragment of Hirukowashi in the World of Beginnings
...These fragments are also connected to their appearance.
changeReason: The relationship description changes from 'will be involved in their unlocking' to 'connected to their appearance' — different framing of how this fragment relates to the listed ones (出現に関わってくる refers to appearance/emergence conditions).
